subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of Baha'u'llah and the beloved of ‘Abdu'l-Baha! Thy letter was received and its contents imparted the utmost happiness.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء الله و عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه تو رسید مضمون بسیار سبب سرور شد
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @entry by troops, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @apostles; early disciples of Christ
